programme.title: Colombiana
programme.desc: In 1992 Bogotá, a little girl watches crime lord Don Luis and his henchman Marco murder her parents. Leaving a lipstick drawing of her namesake on every victim, Cataleya carries out her assignments with efficiency and dreams of avenging her family.
